overall.description: First-person exploration of a post-apocalyptic industrial wasteland at dawn, featuring a burning refinery, large storage tanks with Cyrillic signage, and coastal cliff views. The player character moves through abandoned structures with a weapon visible, transitioning from enclosed industrial areas to open cliffside vistas overlooking a large body of water.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned refinery entrance with burning structure and metal canopy

events.description: player turns right to pass under metal canopy structure

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the wasteland with weapon at ready, approaching a small concrete shed near the burning refinery

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial structure with thick black smoke and bright orange flames
small rectangular building with warm light glowing from doorway
rusted metal roof structure providing partial cover over the path
secondary smoke stack visible on the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a burning industrial refinery at dusk, with thick black smoke rising against a dark blue sky. The player moves forward past a small concrete shed with a warm light inside, passing under a metal canopy structure. Sparse desert vegetation covers the sandy ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with large cylindrical storage tank

events.description: moving from enclosed canopy area into open space around the storage tank
turning left to circle around the large cylindrical tank

agents.ego_description: navigating around a large storage tank, passing a wrecked car, maintaining awareness of surroundings

entered.detail: massive cylindrical industrial tank with Cyrillic text 'СВАРОГНЕФТЬ' and white logo painted on side
abandoned rusted vehicle with broken windows sitting on the dirt path
steep rock face forming the boundary of the industrial area

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into an open industrial yard dominated by a massive cylindrical storage tank with Cyrillic lettering. A wrecked car sits abandoned on the dirt path. The burning refinery remains visible in the distance as the player begins to circle the tank, with rocky cliffs rising on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path approaching burning refinery with coastal water view

events.description: body of water becomes visible beyond the industrial structures
sky lightens significantly as dawn breaks, revealing more detail of the landscape

agents.ego_description: rounding the tank to approach the burning refinery from a new angle, revealing a panoramic water view

entered.detail: large calm lake or sea visible beyond the industrial complex, reflecting the dawn sky
crumbling concrete and stone remains of a destroyed building
metal rails or pipes running along the ground parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: Continuing around the tank, the player approaches the burning refinery from the side, revealing a stunning view of a large body of water in the distance. The sky begins to lighten with dawn colors. Stone ruins and pipeline tracks dot the landscape as the burning structure grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path with panoramic water views

events.description: passing stone ruins and moving along the cliff edge with expansive water view

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge, surveying the water and distant shoreline, weapon still at ready

entered.detail: rocky coastline visible across the water under the dawn sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a cliffside path with expansive views of the calm water below. The burning refinery and storage tank fall behind as the player moves along the edge of the wasteland. The dawn sky shows pink and orange hues above the distant cliffs across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic heat of a burning refinery into an expansive, dawn-lit coastal vista. It begins by moving past a small concrete shed and under a metal canopy, with thick black smoke billowing against a dark blue dusk sky over sandy ground. As the camera emerges into an open industrial yard, the view expands to reveal a massive cylindrical storage tank with Cyrillic lettering and a wrecked car, while rocky cliffs begin to rise on the right. The scene then shifts as the player circles the tank toward the burning refinery, causing the horizon to open up and reveal a large body of water under a lightening sky. Finally, the camera follows a cliffside path where the industrial ruins fall behind, leaving only the calm water and distant cliffs beneath a sky painted in pink and orange hues.
